LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MAX FRUMES MOTION TO QUASH, OR ALTERNATIVELY, VACATE THE JUDGMENT HEREIN. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO GIVE NOTICE, PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 8.3. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MAX FRUMES'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT HE WAS NOT PROPERLY SERVED WITH THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT AS DECLARED UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY BY THE REGISTERED PROCESS SERVER. THE MAILED SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT AND THE REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT WERE NOT RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MAX FRUMES MOTION FOR ORDER TO QUASH OR ALTERNATIVELY VACATE JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP SECTION 473(B) BY PROVIDING A COPY OF PROPOSED RESPONSIVE PLEADING WITH HIS MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAX FRUMES'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT. Appearances: Max A. Frumes (213.590.8711) defendant appearing via Court Call in propria persona. No other appearances. Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: denied with prejudice. Defendant fails to demonstrate that he was not properly served with the summons and complaint as declared under penalty of perjury by the registered process server. The mailed summons and complaint and the request for entry of default were not returned to plaintiff's counsel. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAX FRUMES MOTION TO QUASH, OR ALTERNATIVELY, VACATE THE JUDGMENT HEREIN. Appearances: Max A. Frumes, Defendant in Pro Per Appearing thru CourtCall and opposing party. Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied, without prejudice. Defendant failed to provide copy of proposed responsive pleading with motion, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 473(b). (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Quash Or Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAX FRUMES Motion for Order to Quash or alternatively vacate Judgment. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied. Defendant failed to comply with CCP section 473(b) by providing a copy of proposed responsive pleading with his moving papers. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Quash Or Vacate Judgment And P&A In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MAX FRUMES Motion For Order to Quash or Vacate Judgment. Appearances: Max Frumes, Defendant in Pro Per appearing and moving party. There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar. Defendant failed to provide proper notice pursuant to CCP section 1005. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbbine, CSR #5797

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Text Ruling
